dict.string: Export Macro Groups as individual macros v1.2
CONFIG: set default export path here (without trailing slash)
CONFIG: optionally generate screen shots. (Boolean – set to true or false)
CONFIG: the above settings can override the ones in the "Export Groups" macro
CONFIG: specify how many smart folders should be skipped
Automatic Version: Count Groups and set "Groups_Total"
Generous pause of 5 seconds (because my Mac is old)
Generous pause of 5 seconds (because my Mac is old)
Generous pause of 5 seconds (because my Mac is old)
Skip set amount of groups/smart folders
Set "Groups_Total" to amount of macro groups
Manual Version: set fix amount for “Groups_Total” (USEFUL FOR OLDER COMPUTERS or WHEN THE MACRO STOPS UNEXPECTEDLY)
